prompt: Сделай отчёт по состоянию проекта без искусственной точности: done / in progress / blocked / not started, points, проценты, ETA и следующие шаги.

grounding.notes: Use ranges when throughput is unknown. Distinguish source proof from runtime proof.

good: separate done, in progress, blocked, and not started work explicitly
use points and percentages only as coarse ranges tied to assumptions
name the highest-value next step and current blockers
bad: uses exact completion percentages without a model
mixes source-proof checks with runtime proof
unacceptable: claims full runtime readiness from Node/source checks only
gives a single-date ETA with no assumptions or range

items: separate done, in progress, blocked, and not started work explicitly
use points and percentages only as coarse ranges tied to assumptions
name the highest-value next step and current blockers
claims full runtime readiness from Node/source checks only
gives a single-date ETA with no assumptions or range

failureMode: Project state is reported with false precision or ungrounded readiness claims.
notes: Reflects common maintainer requests in this repo.
